name: atd-file-upload

outputs.description: Task ID of the uploaded sample ATD.Task.jobId Job ID of the uploaded sample
outputs.name: ATD.Task.taskId

outputs.description: The message ID relevant to the uploaded sample ATD.Task.url The URL that was detonated
outputs.name: ATD.Task.messageId

outputs.description: Source IPv4 address ATD.Task.destIp Destination IPv4 address
outputs.name: ATD.Task.srcIp

outputs.description: MD5 of the uploaded sample ATD.Task.SHA1 SHA-1 of the uploaded sample
outputs.name: ATD.Task.MD5

outputs.description: SHA-256 of the uploaded sample ATD.taskId The task ID of the uploaded sample
outputs.name: ATD.Task.SHA256
